privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a livestock weigh-in observation log in the farmOS Field Kit mobile app dated November 15, 2024 with a quantity of 6 head. The log notes must contain a monthly weigh-in summary for a beef cattle demonstration herd with specific animal weights: Animal #12: 485 kg, Animal #18: 512 kg, Animal #23: 467 kg, Animal #31: 498 kg, Animal #45: 520 kg, Animal #07: 475 kg, with an average weight of 493 kg. All data in this task is synthetic and created specifically for testing the agent's ability to interact with the farmOS Field Kit UI to create and populate observation logs.
